scripts.build:shared: cd shared && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:auth: npm run build:shared && cd services/auth-service && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:profile: npm run build:shared && cd services/user-profile-service && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:cv: npm run build:shared && cd services/cv-service && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:document: npm run build:shared && cd services/document-service && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:ats: npm run build:shared && cd services/ats-service && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:ai: npm run build:shared && cd services/ai-service && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:gateway: npm run build:shared && cd api-gateway && npm install && npm run build
